Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
165 
MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Total Medicare Coinsurance Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by Medicaid/CHIP or the managed care plan, on this claim, toward the beneficiary’s 
Medicare coinsurance. 
SHORT NAME: MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 
LONG NAME: MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX
